evidence: We incur significant costs on an ongoing basis to upgrade and maintain various facilities, equipment, or technologies, including data management, improved equipment, and artificial intelligence to upgrade our operations and increase productivity.

Investments in our facilities and operations, including investments in new facilities, equipment, technologies and digital transformation, may result in periods of decreased production or increased costs
artificial intelligence to upgrade our operations and increase productivity
The Company's ability to timely adopt and adapt to this emerging technology in an effective and ethical manner may impact its reputation and ability to compete

the use of generative artificial intelligence tools may compromise confidential or sensitive information, put the Company's intellectual property at risk, or subject the Company to claims of intellectual property infringement

Cyberattacks have also become more difficult to detect and respond to since they increasingly exploit AI and machine learning techniques, such as generative AI-phishing, deepfake impersonations, automated vulnerability discovery, adaptive malware
The rapid evolution and increased adoption of artificial intelligence technologies may intensify our cybersecurity risks.

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, headcount figures, or quantified AI-specific spend disclosed; language is generic and bundled with broader facility/technology investment.
ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use cases are described only aspirationally or as risk scenarios; no named initiatives, deployed systems, or quantified outcomes are disclosed.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Excerpts are labeled [business] rather than a dedicated risk-factor section, though content is clearly risk-disclosing in nature; scored on observable specificity of risk mechanisms described. Scored 4 because specific risk mechanisms (IP infringement, deepfake impersonation, credential-stuffing, cybersecurity intensification) are named with operational detail, though no quantification or named governance body is present.
